title: quercus × thellungii
intro: Quercus × thellungii, a hybrid species of oak tree, is a deciduous plant native to the Himalayan region. Its leaves and bark possess medicinal properties, containing tannins and flavonoids that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × thellungii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, its leaves and bark are often made into infusions, decoctions, or dried to create teas, capsules, or powders that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
